title: Embedded harness install — project_root .pancreator and fresh-install manifest
summary: This feature delivered embedded-install project-root resolution for the Pancreator harness, including the shared @pancreator/core resolver, CLI runtime path prefixing, embedded pan init scaffold behavior, the embedded install manifest, and the associated evaluator, handbook, and regression-test updates.
